page_metadata.biotools__summary: Fast access to public bioinformatic databases and servers for human proteins. Results are returned as a single HTML page that contains the cached and cross-linked output from the following databases/servers: Uniprot/SWISSprot, ensEMBL, BLAST (NCBI), SOURCE, SMART, STRING, PSORT2, CDART, UniGene and SOSUI.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Fast access to public bioinformatic databases and servers for human proteins. Results are returned as a single HTML page that contains the cached and cross-linked output from the following databases/servers: Uniprot/SWISSprot, ensEMBL, BLAST (NCBI), SOURCE, SMART, STRING, PSORT2, CDART, UniGene and SOSUI.
